intro: Own the mania in your town. Shawarmania is opening its proven counter format to franchise partners across West Bengal — small footprint, fast service, a menu Kalyani already queues for.
momentumLine: Two outlets in under a year. A 15K-like viral moment. Lab-certified quality. Now expanding.

models.name: Kiosk
models.notes: Compact counter format — the original Shawarmania footprint.

models.name: Café
models.menuScope: Full menu: shawarma, burgers, waffles, crepes
models.notes: Adds the dessert counter that powers the Kanchrapara outlet.

support.title: Recipe & training
support.description: Full kitchen training on the exact spice rubs, sauces and grill technique — same taste, every outlet.

support.title: Supply chain
support.description: Centralised sourcing of marinades and key ingredients so quality never drifts.

support.title: Site selection
support.description: We help you pick the corner where the evening crowd already walks.

support.title: Launch marketing
support.description: The playbook that took one reel to 15,200 likes — vloggers, offers, opening-week buzz.

support.title: Quality & compliance
support.description: FSSAI setup guidance and periodic lab testing, like our published Prodcontrol report.

process.title: Enquire
process.description: Message us on WhatsApp or send the form — tell us your city and budget.

process.title: Meet & taste
process.description: Visit the Kalyani flagship, taste the menu, meet the team behind the counter.

process.title: Sign & fit-out
process.description: Agreement, site fit-out and kitchen setup with our checklist.

process.title: Launch
process.description: Staff trained, grills on, launch-week marketing live. You're open.

faqs.q: How much does a Shawarmania franchise cost?
faqs.a: We're finalising partner terms — enquire on WhatsApp and we'll share the current investment sheet for kiosk, café and dine-in formats.
No. The counter format is deliberately simple, and full training is part of the package.
West Bengal first — Nadia and North 24 Parganas towns are priority. Tell us your location and we'll check availability.

faqs.q: How is food quality kept consistent?
faqs.a: Central recipes, supplied marinades, training, and periodic independent lab tests — see our published Prodcontrol report.
A kiosk fit-out is measured in weeks, not months. Timeline depends on your site's condition.

enquiry.whatsappPrefill: Hi Shawarmania! I'm interested in a franchise. My city: ___. My budget: ___.
